Alerts.pageDescription: Ona macũhĩrio ma ũgitĩri makoniĩ na mbeere iria ũrendete.
Alerts.title: Ĩyandikithie Macũhĩrio
Alerts.description: Ona macũhĩrio ma mahitũko ma mũcemanio waku

Alerts.namePlaceholder: Rĩĩtwa rĩaku kana rĩa mũungano waku

Alerts.radiusDescription: Ona macũhĩrio thĩinĩ wa mbeere ĩno
Alerts.severityDescription: Thuura ũritũ wa kĩgandũ ũrĩa ũkwenda kwamũkĩra
Alerts.agreementText: Kũhũũra "Ĩyandikithie", nĩũrekania kwamũkĩra macũhĩrio ma barũa ya igiita kuuma WatchTower kũringana na maũndũ marĩa ũthuurĩte igũrũ.
Alerts.validationEmailRequired: Barũa ya igiita nĩ ya batarĩ
Alerts.validationIncidentTypesRequired: Mũthemba ũmwe wa mahitũko nĩ wa batarĩ

Alerts.validationSeverityMax: Ũritũ wa kĩgandũ ti ũrĩa wega
Alerts.ctaDescription: Amba kũhe marũpoti ma mahitũko kũrĩ Watchtower kana wone mepe ciitũ cia mũthenya wothe. Rũpoti rĩothe nĩrĩteithagia gũaka Mũtaratara wa Watho.

IncidentReporting.title: He Rũpoti rĩa Kĩhitũko

IncidentReporting.validationFatalitiesInvalid: Mũigana wa arĩa makuire ti ũrĩa wega

FormSubmission.formNotFoundMessage: Fomu ũrenda ndĩrĩ kana ndũrĩ na ũhoro wa kũmĩona.
FormSubmission.formInactiveMessage: Fomu ĩno rĩu ndĩrĩ thiĩ na ndĩkĩamũkĩra matũma.
FormSubmission.requiredFieldsNotice: Tĩkĩra ũiyũrie icunjĩ ciothe irĩa ĩbataire irĩa irĩ na rũciũ (*)

AnonymousReporting.pageIntro: Rũpoti rwaku nĩrĩo mbere ya ciira ya ũndũ ũrĩa wagĩĩtwo. Hũthĩra mũtararĩko ũyũ ũandĩke kĩhitũko na njĩra ya hitho na ũtamenye. Kĩndũ gĩothe ũratũteithia kĩongerera hinya migongo ciitũ.
AnonymousReporting.termsTitle: Mawatho ma Kũhe Marũpoti na Njĩra ya Hitho
AnonymousReporting.termsIntro: Ũkĩhe rũpoti na njĩra ya hitho, nĩũrekania na ũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩ haha thĩ.
AnonymousReporting.term1: Ũhoro waku wa ũmenyi ndũkamenyeka na ndũkaheano mũndũ o wothe ũmenyekanu.
AnonymousReporting.term2: Watchtower ndũkagĩa na irĩko rĩothe thĩinĩ wa ciira kana ũndũ ũtagĩĩkwo kuuma kũrĩ rũpoti rũrĩa rũheetwo na njĩra ya hitho.
AnonymousReporting.term3: Nĩ ũndũ wa njĩra ũrĩa tũhũthagĩra kũamũkĩra marũpoti, tũtingĩhota kwĩrĩra atĩ nĩũkaona mũcokio kana ũhoro wa ũrĩa rũpoti rwaku rũtũĩre.
AnonymousReporting.term4: Ũhoro wothe ũrĩa ũheetwo nĩũkonanagia na

Home.heroDescription: Watchtower nĩĩhotithagia andũ kuhe marũpoti ma mahitũko ma mũcemanio na kũgaĩra maheni marĩa maũhũ na rũthiomi rwao, ĩkĩongerera wĩra wa gĩthaka wa andũ. Nĩtũhũthagĩra AI na ũgereri wa rũthiomi rwa gũthogotha thĩ kĩa kũgarũra marũpoti matuĩke ũhoro ũkĩhaarĩrie wothe ũrĩa ũngĩhota kũhĩngĩrio.
Home.step1Title: He marũpoti ma mahitũko na rũthiomi rwaku
Home.step2Title: AI ĩgategaga ũhoro na mahitũko mekagĩrwo mepe-inĩ cia mũthenya wothe
Home.step2Description: AI ĩrĩ hinya nĩĩmenyaga matararĩko na maũndũ marĩa matarĩ ma watho.
Home.step3Title: Arũmi a watho na miungano matũmagĩra
Home.step3Description: Kũruta ũhoro ũrĩa ũngĩtũmagĩra kũrĩa kĩndũ kĩothe gĩkaiguuo.
Home.ctaDescription: Amba kũhe marũpoti ma mahitũko kũrĩ Watchtower, kana wone mepe ciitũ cia mũthenya wothe.
